timeline.detail:
I have successfully completed the research and created a comprehensive problem brief for VLA model architecture design innovation. The research identified key current approaches, limitations, and opportunities for novel architectural contributions that could achieve top-venue publication standards.

```yaml
status: done
files_written: 
  - "projects/vla-model-design-for-top-venue-publicati-7b24869b/artifacts/problem_definition/problem_brief_v1.yaml"
notes: "Comprehensive problem brief created based on extensive research of current VLA models (RT-2, OpenVLA, π0, GR00T N1, Helix, Octo) and identification of key architectural innovation opportunities. The proposed direction focuses on hierarchical multi-scale architecture with efficient attention mechanisms, cross-embodiment adaptation, and long-horizon reasoning capabilities. Research identified 5 major existing approaches, 5 key limitations, and defined ambitious but achievable success criteria for top-venue publication."
```

**Sources:**
- [Vision-language-action model - Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vision-language-action_model)
- [Vision Language Action Models in Robotic Manipulation: A Systematic Review](https://arxiv.org/html/2507.10672v1)
- [OpenVLA: An Open-Source Vision-Language-Action Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2406.09246)
- [10 Open Challenges Steering the Future of Vision-Language-Action Models](https://arxiv.org/html/2511.05936v1)
- [Vision-Language-Action Models: Concepts, Progress, Applications and
